title: ChargePoint enhances charging stations with AI as shares slide amid slower EV sales growth
text: ChargePoint focuses on three key verticals: commercial, fleet, and residential. The fleet segment is a strategic focus area for the company's growth. In North America in 2023, corporate fleets saw charging sessions increasing approximately 83% from the prior year compared to approximately 54% increase in active port count. This demonstrates strong utilization growth in the fleet segment, with session growth significantly outpacing infrastructure expansion. Project delays on the fleet side of ChargePoint's business were a drag on second quarter revenues as of September 2024, indicating some near-term challenges despite the long-term growth trajectory. ChargePoint lowered the barrier to entry for fleet electrification with the introduction of the CPF50, an affordable Level 2 charging solution that enables more fleets to go electric with access to ChargePoint's advanced fleet and telematics software platform.
